name: HWR_TASK_B
description: The task table stores tasks which are part of projects.

columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the task table.

columns.Name: PAR_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Parent Task Id of The Task.

columns.Name: PROJECT_KEY
columns.Comments: This is the unique project key of the project containing the task.

columns.Name: TASK_KEY
columns.Comments: This is the unique key of the task.

columns.Name: TASK_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the unique name of the task.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This stores the start date of the task.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This stores the end date of the task.

columns.Name: TASK_DURATION
columns.Comments: This stores the duration of the task.

columns.Name: TASK_HOURS_OF_WORK
columns.Comments: This is the total hours of work of the task.

columns.Name: IS_ROLLUP_TASK
columns.Comments: This stores whether the task is rollup or not.

columns.Name: IS_MILESTONE
columns.Comments: This stores whether the given task is a milestone or not.

columns.Name: OUTLINE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This stores the outline number of the task.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
